moments.title: World Cup Knockouts Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage concludes, with the highly anticipated Round of 32 kicking off on Sunday, June 28th, bringing high-stakes knockout football to Canada, Mexico, and the US.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: It's do-or-die time! The World Cup Round of 32 kicks off this weekend. Who are you backing to make it through to the last 16?

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England are through to the Round of 32 at the World Cup! Catch their next game on Saturday against Panama. Can they go all the way?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: An exceptional and potentially historic heatwave continues across much of the UK, with temperatures in central and southern England reaching into the mid-30s Celsius, and warnings for thunderstorms as conditions begin to change.

angles.name: Scorching Temperatures
angles.copy: Another scorching day across the UK! Temperatures are soaring, with some areas hitting record highs for June. Stay hydrated and find some shade!

angles.name: Thunderstorm Watch
angles.copy: After the intense heat, thunderstorm warnings are in place for parts of the UK over the next few days. Keep an eye on the forecast!

angles.name: Local Heat
angles.copy: It's still exceptionally hot across Wales/Devon today! Remember to check on vulnerable neighbours and keep cool.

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Starts
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival begins today, running until July 12th, featuring a line-up that includes David Gray, OMD, Pete Tong, The Stranglers, Elvis Costello & The Imposters, Nile Rodgers & CHIC, and Sophie Ellis-Bextor.

angles.name: Palace Gigs
angles.copy: Hampton Court Palace Festival kicks off tonight! Imagine seeing legendary acts like Nile Rodgers & CHIC or David Gray in such a stunning setting.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Ready for some incredible live music? The Hampton Court Palace Festival brings a fantastic mix of artists, from OMD to Sophie Ellis-Bextor, over the next few weeks.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Begins
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park starts tomorrow, June 26th, bringing major headliners like Garth Brooks and Lewis Capaldi to London's iconic park throughout the summer.

angles.name: Hyde Park Calling
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is back! Kicking off tomorrow with a huge line-up over the next few weeks. Who are you most excited to see in London?

angles.name: Summer in the City
angles.copy: London's Hyde Park is about to get loud! BST Hyde Park starts tomorrow, bringing some of the biggest names in music to the capital. Get ready for some unforgettable summer nights.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Start
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 begin on Monday, June 29th, with two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Time
angles.copy: It's almost time for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday. Who's your pick for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles this year?

angles.name: London Grand Slam
angles.copy: The greatest tennis tournament in the world returns to London next week! Get ready for two weeks of thrilling action at Wimbledon.

moments.title: Carly Simon's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain,' turns 83 today.

angles.name: You're So Vain
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Carly Simon! What's your favourite track from her incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Legendary Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Carly Simon! Her songwriting has touched generations. Which of her songs means the most to you?

moments.title: Eddie Floyd's Birthday
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B legend Eddie Floyd, best known for his hit 'Knock on Wood,' celebrates his 89th birthday today.

angles.name: Knock On Wood
angles.copy: Happy 89th Birthday to the incredible Eddie Floyd! 'Knock on Wood' is still an absolute banger. What's your favourite Stax Records track?

angles.name: Soul Man
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true soul icon, Eddie Floyd! From songwriting for others to his own massive hits, he's a legend.

moments.title: Benson Boone's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Benson Boone, who rose to fame with his hit 'Beautiful Things,' turns 24 today.

angles.name: Beautiful Things
angles.copy: Happy 24th Birthday to Benson Boone! 'Beautiful Things' has been huge. What's your favourite new artist right now?

angles.name: Pop Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to rising pop star Benson Boone! What's the song you can't stop playing from him?

moments.title: Ricky Gervais' Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed English comedian, actor, writer, and director Ricky Gervais celebrates his 65th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the one and only Ricky Gervais! What's your favourite moment from 'The Office' or his stand-up specials?

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to British comedy icon Ricky Gervais! Always pushing boundaries and making us laugh.

moments.title: Chris Isaak's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rock and roll singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive voice and hits like 'Wicked Game,' turns 70 tomorrow.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Wicked Game
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Chris Isaak turns 70! 'Wicked Game' is timeless. What's your go-to late-night classic?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a rock and roll icon! Chris Isaak's 70th birthday is tomorrow. His unique sound is instantly recognisable.

moments.title: Ryan Tedder's Birthday
moments.blurb: OneRepublic frontman and prolific songwriter Ryan Tedder celebrates his 47th birthday tomorrow.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: OneRepublic Leader
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday for tomorrow to OneRepublic's dynamic frontman, Ryan Tedder! What's your favourite OneRepublic hit?

angles.name: Hit Songwriter
angles.copy: Beyond OneRepublic, Ryan Tedder has written hits for countless artists. Wishing a very Happy Birthday for tomorrow to a true music powerhouse!

moments.title: Ariana Grande's Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande turns 33 tomorrow.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Ariana Grande! What's your top Ariana track?

angles.name: Global Superstar
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a pop icon! Ariana Grande's birthday is tomorrow. Her influence on music and pop culture is undeniable.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival wrapped up on Sunday, June 21st, after a weekend of diverse performances from headliners like The Cure, Lewis Capaldi and Calvin Harris.

angles.name: Festival Highlights
angles.copy: Who made it to the Isle of Wight Festival this year? What were your highlights from the weekend?

angles.name: Post-Festival Blues
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the Isle of Wight Festival? Or are you feeling the post-festival blues? Tell us your favourite moment from the weekend!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival concluded on Sunday, June 21st, after a weekend of music at Glasgow Green featuring headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Memories
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival might be over, but the memories live on! What was your favourite set or highlight from Glasgow Green this year?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Season
angles.copy: Another fantastic TRNSMT in the books! The Scottish festival season is in full swing. What's next on your gig list?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Buzz
moments.blurb: Clarkson's Farm Season 5, which saw its final episodes drop on June 17th, continues to generate buzz as Jeremy Clarkson tackles new challenges on Diddly Squat Farm.

angles.name: Diddly Squat Debates
angles.copy: Have you finished Clarkson's Farm Season 5? What did you make of the latest antics at Diddly Squat?

angles.name: Farm Life
angles.copy: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 has given us plenty to talk about! What's been your favourite moment or biggest surprise this season?

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island Season 13, which premiered on June 4th, continues to dominate evening viewing as new Islanders enter the villa and relationships form and fray.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's cracking on? The drama in the Love Island villa is heating up! What are your predictions for this week?

angles.name: Favourite Islanders
angles.copy: Love Island Season 13 is in full swing! Who are your favourite Islanders so far and who do you think will go the distance?
